name: Bootleg Access
facilities: Primitive MDC canoe/kayak access, primitive camping (Sep 15-May 15), hiking loop; no concrete ramp. Washington County. Coord = MDC GIS Entry Point (road/parking); Big River channel ~450 m E (~37.8156,-90.7646).

name: Leadwood Access
facilities: Small MDC access (electric motors only), carry/gravel launch, parking. St. Francois County, Hwy 8 & Hunt St, Leadwood. Coord = MDC GIS Entry Point, corroborated by USGS gauge 'Big River Below Leadwood Access' (37.86804,-90.58293).

name: Jeremiah Blackwell Jr. Access
facilities: MDC 'Blackwell Access' at ~RM 12 (right bank) per floatmissouri; MDC watershed report notes a 12-ft vertical bank with NO boat/canoe launching. Absent from MDC GIS (Boat Ramps/Entry Points/Parking), OSM, and USGS -> no verifiable coordinate. Approx. near Blackwell community (~38.044,-90.621). UNVERIFIED.

name: Washington State Park Access
facilities: Missouri State Parks main put-in / concession (canoe-raft-tube rental, shuttle service), concrete boat ramp, vault toilet, parking. St. Francois/Washington Co. Coord = OSM slipway, corroborated by USGS 'Big River at Washington State Park' (38.08762,-90.68071).

name: Mammoth Access
facilities: MDC concrete boat ramp, parking. Washington County, off Mammoth Rd (Mammoth Bridge), ~RM 23.3. Coord = MDC GIS Boat Ramps layer, corroborated by USGS 07018000 + station 380722090403501 and OSM slipway.

name: Merrill Horse Access
facilities: MDC concrete boat ramp, parking. Jefferson County, Route H W of De Soto, ~RM 28.7. NOTE: official name is 'Merrill Horse' (not 'Merrill Horne'). Coord = MDC GIS Boat Ramps layer + OSM slipway (38.16349,-90.70927).

name: Brown's Ford Access
facilities: MDC boat ramp; grounds/facilities maintained by Jefferson County Parks (636-797-5334). Jefferson County, Brown's Ford Rd bridge, ~RM 34. Coord = MDC GIS Boat Ramps layer + OSM slipway (38.21262,-90.70613).

name: Morse Mill Access
facilities: Jefferson County (Morse Mill Park, 6700 Morse Mill Park Rd, Hillsboro): concrete boat ramp (upstream access), primitive camping, restrooms, picnic. HAZARD: Morse Mill Dam ~0.1 mi downstream - portage required. ~RM 52.3. Coord = OSM slipway, corroborated by adjacent Historic Morse Mill Bridge (38.27532,-90.65237).

name: Cedar Hill Access
facilities: Jefferson County (Cedar Hill Park, 6801 Cedar Hill Rd): Big River access, picnic, restrooms. HAZARD: Cedar Hill Dam ruins immediately adjacent. ~RM 63.2. Coord = OSM slipway, corroborated by USGS 'Big River at Cedar Hill' (38.34990,-90.64444) and OSM Cedar Hill dam ruins (38.34992,-90.64405).

name: Rockford Beach Park
facilities: Jefferson County (Rockford Park / Rockford Beach, 4320 State Rd W, House Springs): concrete boat ramp, sand beach, restrooms, parking. = floatmissouri 'House Springs Access' ~RM 73. Coord = OSM park polygon nearest Big River channel (no exact ramp node) - medium precision.
